sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Leitung nopnate lunggulh nawn kei i ng,
Singlamteh phungah ka lungsim nga ing,
Jesuh si in vuk bangin hong ngosak zo

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka it hi, ka it hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna sungah khatvei ka mangthang hi,
Pasian ka hehsak ding ka lau ngei hi,
Ahih hang Jesuh si in mawhna teng sil

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kol bulhna thuak ngei ha’ng tu’n suakta ing,
Si ngei zo, hih hang tu’n Khazih sung hing,
piakkhiat kilemna leitung teng ka gen ding.
